codeReview.summary: The implementation adds skills migration, command allowlist migration, agent config migration, and archive logic to the migration script. The commit primarily adds 980 lines of comprehensive tests and fixes a bug in backupIfExists() for directory handling. The implementation logic itself was already present in the script from prior commits. All 13 validation contract assertions (VAL-SKILL-001 to 005, VAL-CMD-001 to 002, VAL-AGENT-001 to 003, VAL-ARCH-001 to 003) have corresponding test coverage. The implementation handles all three conflict modes (skip/overwrite/rename) correctly, deduplicates allowlist patterns, archives unmapped items as valid JSON, and reports skipped items with reasons.

summary: Feature passes code review. The implementation is complete and well-tested with 19 new test cases covering all 13 assertions. The only code change to the migration script itself is a bug fix in backupIfExists() to properly handle directories using fs.cp() with recursive option. No blocking or non-blocking issues found. No shared state gaps identified.
